data.title: FormFactor, Inc. director Kevin Brewer to retire; not standing for re-election at 2026 Annual Meeting.
data.description: In Livermore, California, on February 18, 2026, Kevin Brewer, a director of FormFactor, Inc. since 2024, has informed the company of his intention to retire from the Board of Directors following the conclusion of his current term. As a result, Mr. Brewer will not be seeking re-election at the company's upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled for May 15, 2026. It is important to note that Mr. Brewer's decision is not based on any disagreements with FormFactor regarding its operations, policies, or practices.

data.title: Keros Therapeutics to present at healthcare conferences - Nasdaq: KROS - President & CEO to speak.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Keros Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that their President and CEO, Jasbir S. Seehra, Ph.D., will be speaking at upcoming healthcare conferences. Keros is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm traded on Nasdaq under the symbol KROS. The company specializes in creating and marketing innovative treatments for patients affected by disorders related to abnormal signaling of the transforming growth factor-beta family of proteins.

data.title: M&T Bank Corp declares $1.50 per share dividend on common stock, payable to shareholders on March 31, 2026.
data.description: In Buffalo, New York, on February 18, 2026, M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $1.50 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of March 2 will receive the dividend on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Shore Bancshares, Inc. declares $0.12/share dividend, payable March 18 to stockholders of record on March 4.
data.description: Shore Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHBI), based in Easton, Maryland, revealed on February 18, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share for their common stock. The dividend is set to be distributed on March 18, 2026, to stockholders recorded on March 4, 2026. Shore Bancshares...

data.title: Anika Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ANIK) CEO to present at Canaccord Genuity 2026 Musculoskeletal Conference on March 2, 2026.
data.description: Bedford, Massachusetts - Anika Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIK), a leading global company specializing in joint preservation in early intervention orthopedics, shared news on Feb. 18, 2026, about the upcoming participation of Steve Griffin, President and CEO, at the Canaccord Genuity 2026 Musculoskeletal Conference in New Orleans. The event is scheduled for Monday, March 2, 2026, at 11:30am CT / 12:30pm ET. Apart from the presentation, the management team will engage in individual investor meetings during the conference.

data.title: NaLA praises FCC's rulemaking to revamp Lifeline program for low-income connectivity; updating Universal Service Fund.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Washington, the National Lifeline Association (NaLA) expressed support for the Federal Communications Commission's (FCC) decision to initiate a rulemaking process aimed at modernizing the Lifeline low-income sustainable connectivity support program under the Universal Service Fund. NaLA commends this step towards enhancing communication access for underserved communities and looks forward to the potential improvements this update could bring to the program.

data.title: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals plans public offering of common shares per a SEC filing, leveraging Diffusphere™ technology.
data.description: In Victoria, British Columbia, on Feb. 18, 2026, Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Inc. announced the filing of a preliminary prospectus supplement for a proposed public offering of common shares. The Company, traded on NASDAQ:EPRX and TSX:EPRX, specializes in controlled drug delivery through its Diffusphere™ technology. The supplement was filed in connection with the short form base shelf prospectus dated Feb. 5, 2024, and part of a registration statement on Form-10 declared effective by the SEC on Feb. 7, 2024. This offering will involve the sale of Common Shares or pre-funded warrants to purchase them, addressing significant unmet medical needs in various applications.

data.title: Dogfish Head and the Grateful Dead have launched a new Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager, a collaboration that celebrates creativity and curiosity. The beer is introduced alongside the brewery's "Daydream Playbook."
data.description: Embracing curiosity, innovation, and unconventional paths, a brewery has introduced its newest beer collaboration in conjunction with the release of its "Daydream Playbook."

data.title: Saia to sponsor 8 races in 2026 NASCAR Cup Series in partnership with Joe Gibbs Racing.
data.description: For the upcoming season, the carrier company will act as the main sponsor for a total of eight races.

data.title: New Richmond American Homes community, Haven at Murieta, to launch in Rancho Murieta, featuring single- & two-story homes.
data.description: RANCHO MURIETA, Calif., Feb. 18, 2026 - New residential community Haven at Murieta introduces a diverse selection of recently-built single and two-story homes. Developed by Richmond American Homes of Maryland, Inc., the California Department of Real Estate has officially licensed this real estate broker under Corporation License Number 01842595.

data.title: Health care attorney Terra Parten joins Williams Mullen's Health Care Section in Virginia, one of the largest in the state.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on February 18, 2026, Williams Mullen welcomed Terra R. Parten to their Health Care Section, which is recognized as one of the leading health care practices in the state. The firm's health care practice, known for its expertise, serves a wide range of clients including hospitals, hospital systems, and academic institutions. This addition further strengthens the team, reinforcing their position as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Atlantic Biomass, LLC unveils dual pathway system for affordable Sustainable Aviation Fuels & Bioproducts. Feedstocks involve Perennial Grasses & Biomass.
data.description: Perennial grasses and other renewable biomass sources are being considered for use as feedstocks in the aviation industry. As of February 18, 2026, the main reason passenger and freight planes are not utilizing renewable biofuel is due to its high cost. The conversion of sustainable biomass such as stems and leaves into biofuel is currently a costly endeavor, deterring its widespread adoption in the aviation sector.

data.title: VCI Global partners with Mezzofy for enterprise RWA infrastructure commercialization, aiming to capture recurring revenue.
data.description: VCIG has recently finalized a definitive agreement with Mezzofy, positioning the company to tap into recurring transaction revenue, secondary liquidity value, and scalable digital commerce infrastructure opportunities. This strategic move is expected to significantly boost VCIG's financial prospects and business expansion.

data.title: New bill SB 1076 mandates insurance companies to provide coverage for fire-safe homes, introduced by Senator Pérez.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, on February 18, 2026, Senator Sasha Renée Pérez proposed a new bill, SB 1076 - the Insurance Coverage for Fire-Safe Homes Act. This legislation aims to guarantee that homeowners who implement fire-safety measures in their homes will be eligible to acquire and maintain home insurance. The bill has garnered co-sponsorship from various parties.
